channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Still one roll of carpet on footpath despite council informing that issue was replaced., 9th April
item.description:
Precisely reported. Received email that issue investigated and resolved yet one roll of carpet remains. Issue not resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Car dumped, incorrectly parked, blocking my neighbours drive access

item.description:
Van has been left for weeks. Blocking viability on the turning

Left on the road

item.title: Mattress and chair, 9th April
item.description:
These have been left there since last Friday (good Friday)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pendrell Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant problems with rubbish on Grove Lane, 9th April
item.description:
We swept outside 4-6 Grove Lane this morning and this is what it looks like 6 hours later. Please provide more street bins and move green bins off street which are constantly overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bins are full, 9th April
item.description:
There is 4 bins for animal waste and the are full and as it’s around the playground where the children supposed to play they really stinks and it will be very helpful if someone can take care of them please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Around a 10” pot hole, 9th April
item.description:
I have noticed the bump going right across this part of the road but this hole here is getting deeper. The whole road need to be resurfaced where the hole is.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merryfield, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 9th April
item.description:
Outside 1-8 peacock street by bins this has been here for about 3 days now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-48, Peacock Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swan mead 10-30 first floor back of staircase, 9th April
item.description:
We found the graffiti first floor of this building on back of staircase please paint it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swan Mead, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 9th April
item.description:
Some of the lights at the junction of old Surrey canal and the paths to the BMX and wells way are broken since the filming of Supacell in March/April 2026 Please fix this and hold the filming crew accountable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Camden Town station Kentish Town Road side, 9th April
item.description:
I have just tried to upload photos to show you, but I’m getting strange error messages. I would be happy to forward these to an email address. There is a long‑standing temporary pedestrian walkway associated with a stalled development on Kentish Town Road. The hoarding licence displayed on site expired on 05/10/2021, yet the hoarding and pavement occupation remain in place.The pedestrian route is poorly maintained, frequently blocked or displaced, and vehicles regularly park at the exit point, forcing pedestrians into live traffic. This fails to provide clear and safe pedestrian access as required by the licence conditions and presents an ongoing safety risk, particularly for disabled users. Given the pedestrianisation in Camden Town, Kentish Town Road has become busier with traffic than ever, so the possibility of an accident is higher. Please can this site be inspected urgently for unauthorised occupation of the highway and unsafe pedestrian provision.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge blocking the pavement, 9th April
item.description:
Hedge off 123 wells way is overgrown and blocks the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wells Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture pieces left on pavement, 9th April
item.description:
These pieces of furniture were left on the pavement for over 4 days. Please collect these and hold the people responsible to account. I suspect these are coming from some of the neighbouring houses on rainbow road or the flats above the pub. This happens every other week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Set of Corner Shelves Dumped on Pavement, 9th April
item.description:
A unwanted set of corner shelves has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 87. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
